environmental_storytelling.example: Azuchi castle rising from waters signals world-state shift from normal to supernatural crisis
Disciples and demons visually reflect Zao's dark influence and Zareth's control; 'dark and bizarre' aesthetic communicates antagonist power
Alternate Japan fantasy setting with supernatural elements communicates narrative stakes and world corruption

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Initiates combat with magical spells; charges attacks for increased power; adapts spell type to tactical need
Engage player in screen-filling patterns; attack with projectiles; multiply in complexity during resurrection ritual phases
Off-screen; motivates player progression; rescue objective drives narrative
Environmental presence increases; likely serves as stage progression context and visual indicator of ritual advancement

notes: Mystic Defender uses classic shmup visual communication: power-ups signal safety/progression, enemy density and variety signal danger escalation, and environmental transformation (castle rising) communicates world-state crisis. The game relies on aesthetic differentiation (dark/bizarre designs) to signal faction affiliation and antagonist influence. Limited visual documentation available; inferences based on narrative structure and genre conventions.
